sourceMovie.title: Good News
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Good News works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The thriller and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Parasite
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good News clicked for you, Parasite (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Good News?
faq.answer: Try Parasite, In Order of Disappearance, High Anxiety—each shares DNA with Good News while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Good News?
faq.answer: Good News (2025) is best described as Thriller, Comedy, History. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Good News worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
